facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 194 reviews. One spa on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo that keeps showing up on every local recommendation list.

ZEN Spa & Nail (2) in Phú Quốc is the kind of place that earns repeat customers. Nails, massages, and treatments done right, at a relaxed island pace.

If your feet need a break from the beaches, this is the stop. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
